title: I Like Pink
description: The love story of Poopy and Explodey, who must escape the grasp of Peg Pelvis Pete.
quote: There’s nothing wrong here in Montana, Poopy. Do you want to pick my nose, Poopy?
altHero: hand-drawn animation of dogs Poopy and Explodey riding in an airplane
alt2: Poopy and Explodey under the ocean
alt3: Peg Pelvis Pete running down the street
alt4: Poopy and Explodey in their home
